violations.text: Raw animal foods (such as shell eggs) were observed stored above ready-to-eat foods (such as prepared soups and sauces) in the 1-door reach-in refrigerator. Raw animal foods must be separated from raw ready-to-eat food such as vegetables during storage. Food items were rearranged during the time of inspection. Portuguese Refrigerator Separation Storage Poster French Haitian Refrigerator Separation Storage Poster Cape Verdean Refrigerator Separation Storage Poster Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 04/29/2026

Proper cooling methods were not used for time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods. Octopus was placed hot in the refrigerator in covered containers. Food items shall remain uncovered in a protected location until completely cooled. Covers were removed during the time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 04/29/2026

The walls in the bar area are constructed of untreated plywood. This material is not durable. Materials for wall surfaces shall be smooth, durable, easily cleanable, and non-absorbent for areas subject to moisture such as food preparation areas, walk-in refrigerators, ware-washing areas, and toilet rooms. New Violation. Correct By: 10/29/2026
The gasket for the prep unit was observed in poor repair. Gaskets must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 02/14/2025
Chest freezers were observed with an accumulation of ice. Establishment is to run defrost on unit. New Violation. Correct By: 01/28/2025

The dumpster outside is located on an absorbent material. The outdoor storage surface for refuse, recyclables, and returnable must be constructed of nonabsorbent material such as concrete or asphalt and must be smooth, durable, and sloped to drain. Establishment is to move dumpster to the nonabsorbent surface of parking lot. New Violation. Correct By: 07/14/2025

The floors throughout the basement have an accumulation of soil residue, droppings, and/or food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 01/15/2025
